entry.title: Re: Error in SUM: MAIN_SHDPREPUT/RUN_RSPTBFIL_PREP_DIST_P...

Hi Denny,

Are you using the latest version of SUM?

Regards

SS

entry.title: Ariba to SAP S4HANA Cloud Integration Supplier Masterdata Standard Field Mapping
entry.content:
Hello!

We have a requirements to provide standard field mapping for supplier masterdata from Ariba to S4HANA Cloud. Do we have any documentation or anything for this item?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Hotspot not working when EDIT is active
entry.content: I already answered "It's not possible. Use double click instead." I meant to have a hotspot field by default, and to change it to a non-hotspot editable field either by tabulation or by any button (ABAP code will change the definitions of fields).

entry.title: OM Custom Tables called in Payroll
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I need to pay location-based allowances to employees. As such, a custom infotype is created & amount or % is saved in it. I need to refer employee's Organizational Unit (ORGEH) in IT0001. Based upon this Org Unit's Custom infotype NNNN, I need to refer to the Amt or % field (XXXXX) to calculate the Location-based allowance.

I tried to call Z Table of the Z infotype using TABLEPNNNN & further to access its field Num = BXXXXX. But the payroll says this field can not be identified. "The PNNNN-XXXXX field could not be interpreted". 

May I know how to call that Custom infotype in Payroll ??

Thanks n Regards,

Bindumadhav Ambike

entry.title: Re: Error in SUM: MAIN_SHDPREPUT/RUN_RSPTBFIL_PREP_DIST_P...
entry.content:
Hi Sriram!

Yes:

Software Update Manager:
2.0 SP19 (PL4)
Software Logistics UI Client:
2.27.4
SAPUI5 Framework Version:
1.71.55
Software Logistics Protocol:
1.5.0

entry.title: Re: Hotspot not working when EDIT is active
entry.content: It's a bug in your program then. Or if it's not, check SAP notes or contact SAP support.

entry.title: Free Sap certification one attempt for student
entry.content:
Hey there, SAP community!

Hope everyone's doing great.

I'm currently a student and interning as a SAP FICO consultant.

I'm eager to learn more and would love to know if there are any opportunities for students to get a free shot at SAP certification,  Could you please advise me on how to access such opportunities?

Would really appreciate any guidance you can offer.

Thanks a bunch!

entry.title: Re: Hotspot not working when EDIT is active
entry.content: By the way, there are lots of SAP demo programs, try them to check what line is returned by the double click.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning Data Action Advance Formula
entry.content:
Hi all

using Data action I have to multiply a measure (percentage) which is stored under unassigned for all dimensions except for Cost center and Date with Salary of all employee

I have around 400 employee.

when i multiply it does not produce any result.

 

 

 

CONFIG.GENERATE_UNBOOKED_DATA=OFF
MEMBERSET[d/GL_Account]=("700102","800204","620401")
MEMBERSET[d/SAP_Cost_Center]=(BASEMEMBER([d/SAP_Cost_Center].[h/H1] ,"Cell Tech","Elec Tech","SG&A","Support OH" ))	

	DATA([d/Measures]="Benefit_Dollar",[d/Date]="202401") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Salary",[d/Date]="202401") *
	RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="FICA_Medicare",[d/EE_ID]="#",[d/Date]="202401",[d/GL_Account]="#",[d/HR_Band]="#",[d/Job_Title]="#",[d/Name]="#",[d/Type]="#")​

 

 

 

 

Can someone please help with this. Any solutions.

 

Thanks in advance.

 

SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud for planning

entry.title: Import Email address from Batch input in BKNB1
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm trying to import customers using a batch input that loads the BKNB1 table.

I would like to import the email address as well, to do so I'm writing the email in the field SMTP_addr

entry.title: Re: special characters are not getting converted sometimes while Outbound IDOC is triggered from S4
entry.content: My 2 cents: if RFC is sent to SAP PO, XML is not implied in EHS, so it's not a bug in EHS but a bug in SAP PO. If you used the standard SAP PO features to generate the XML, did you check SAP notes or contact SAP Support?

entry.title: Payment Integration-UTR Number from the Bank and send the payment advice to the vendor accordingly
entry.content: Please Help me regarding this Enhancement.

entry.title: CK40N costing level doesn't show materials costed without errors
entry.content:
Hello,

In CK40N, on tab "Costing levels" the following is displayed:

Level No objects Mesage No COst estimates Costing msgs Status Costing status
7 12 0 12 2 KA Costed Without Errors
6 40 0 40 114 KF Costed with Errors
5 286 0 286 202 KF Costed with Errors
4 489 0 489 63 KF Costed with Errors
3 1.627 0 1.627 117 KF Costed with Errors
2 7.502 0 7.502 381 KF Costed with Errors
1 914 0 914 90 KF Costed with Errors

Looks like 12 materials have been costed overall without error. But this is not the case. 12 materials on level 7 have been costed without error. But there are more materials that have been costed without error, if I go to "Material Overview", on a different level. But these materials are not shown on tab "Costing levels" with status KA Costed without error.

Is that a bug, should I open an incident to SAP?

Thank you,
Joachim

entry.title: Impact of reverting ADVANCED_INDEX_COMPRESSION_OPTIONS parameter
entry.content:
Hi Sap,

We are reverting ADVANCED_INDEX_COMPRESSION_OPTIONS parameter and rebuilding the affected indexes in our SAP environment. 

Please let us know if 

  1. Any potential risks or side effects associated with this change.
  2. Impact on data consistency.
  3. Any recommended best practice or steps to mitigate risks and ensure a smooth transition.

Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Impact of reverting ADVANCED_INDEX_COMPRESSION_OPTION...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

The only side effect of the change is that the index size will be bigger without the compression.

On the data inconsistency there won't be any impact.

For more information you can check below note:

2138262 - Oracle Database 12c Advanced Compression for SAP Systems 

Best regards,
SAP Product Support

entry.title: CIG transaction tracker handling
entry.content:
Since 2024 we are sending documents via Ariba CIG which means we had some time to get familiar with Transaction Tracker, especially for error handling. This question might be related to missing experience but we checked all available CIG documentation and did not find proper answers.

As per our impression, CIG transaction tracker seems to be foreseen for "manual" handling or the handling of a lower number of documents. Please find our biggest concerns below:

1. It doesn't seem to be possible to be actively informed about errors (e.g. in case of failed status) and to set up any scheduled reports
-> That means it seems to be necessary to login to CIG on a regular basis and manually search for documents or download the list in excel

2. If you download a list of documents, the error message in case of failed status is not part of the list at all
-> You can only see document errors by using mouseover function for each document. This highly increases the analysis effort

3. It is not possible to do any kind of clearing in CIG (delete / obsolete failed documents)
-> That means it is impossible to keep track of which documents have been already cleaned up and which still require attention

4. Maximum document number to be downloaded in excel is 5000
-> currently we exchange already more than 5000 documents per day. As we just have migrated 25% of our suppliers to CIG, this number will extremely grow. We can't download a list several times a day to track documents. 

 

We would appreciate to receive any feedback / best practices about how other Partners are dealing with CIG transaction tracker, especially those with higher document count. Do you see any solution for the issues described above?

entry.title: Re: Variant management & View functionality
entry.content:
Hello ghemraj,

Apologies for the confusion. View Creation is a specific terms in process intelligence.

In process manager you can indeed create views. A view can be use to see a model which contains different variants of one process. However, in a view, you solely include what you want to show an audience and exclude what the audience does not need to see. You do not create variant there.


Examples for using different views of process models:
• A model contains both user activities and elements for technical implementation. The audience wants to
focus on the technical implementation.
• A model contains different variants of one process. The audience should only view one variant.
• A model contains the expected path of a process and a number of exceptions. The audience doesn't need to see the exceptions.

 

Variant management is about creating specific process and witness their execution in diverse setups. Variant Management is managing the multitude of variants in processes by both identification and modeling of variants.

 

Let me know if that's help.

entry.title: Hide Crystal report parameter while execute report into SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to disable / Hide parameter while execute the crystal report into SAP Business One. I have tried also with "Do not show option" under Show on Panel (Viewer) but it is not working.

Need to hide parameter of document numbering ask each time while CR is running into SAP B1. 

SAP Business one with MS SQL

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

can you please support me

entry.title: Re: Table for sap query users group and assigned user
entry.content: Just in case other users are looking for similar information. I just came across this program in SA38 while looking for last execution and usage for SQ01 queries. You can find assigned user to each user group in SQ03 using SA38 and then execute RSAQUSGR. Enter either name or user group to receive the information.

entry.title: Re: RAP service consumption model - OData $expand issue
entry.content: here I put the solution: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/usage-of-expand-entity-in-odata-service-consumption-model/ba-p/13598261

entry.title: Re: Itemized Down Payment Clearing in MIRO
entry.content: Dear Experts. Can I get any guidance on the above mentioned issue?

entry.title: Re: Creating Sales Order Drafts via SAP Business One Serv...
entry.content: I got the OwnerCode to be updated by using the DocumentsOwner key. I checked the Data Transfer Workbench template and saw that this was the key to the OwnerCode column.

entry.title: Transferring of Data between Enhancements using Singleton Class
entry.content:
Hi Experts 

I'm facing a strange issue while using Singleton class object with a static data attribute to transfer data between two enhancements in the update task. 

In the Enhancement 1, I'm creating an instance of the class and using a Put method to set certain data to a static attribute of the class which I want to pass on to the second enhancement. 

In the Enhancement 2, I'm using the instance of the singleton class and retrieving the data passed in Enhancement 1 using a GET method.  

Both the enhancements are called in the Update Task.

Now the issue. When I place a break point in both the enhancement and execute the process, things work fine. In the Enhancement 2, the class's object is already available and I'm able to get the data transferred from Enhancement 1 using the GET method. 

But when I don't use the debugging, when the background process executes Enhancement 2, somehow the class object is not instantiated, and the data passed from Enhancement 1 is lost. 

Any pointers on why this is happening and how to resolve this would be much helpful. 

Thanks

entry.title: Multiple ECTR Installations ECC-5.1 and S4-1.2 on Clients
entry.content:
Hi folks,

I have the following problem:
We have ECC systems (ECTR 5.1) and S4 systems (ECTR S4 1.2) in our landscape.

ECTR is already set up on the clients for the ECC system, but not yet for S4.

How can I make both systems work with ECTR?

As far as I can see, we cannot make one client installation work for both. We need one installation for ECC and one for S4.

Unfortunately, the installations in the directory C:\ProgramData\SAP\ECTR\installation\ectr overwrite each other.

Once this problem has been solved, the next one will come up:
The Env variable %PLM_INSTDIR% is consumed by both installations.

This is certainly not an isolated case for us.
Does anyone here have any experience?

Thank you

entry.content: Is this document available somewhere else?

entry.title: Full day Leave Request
entry.content:
Is it Possible to male visible only Full Day Option From Drop Down List While Creating Leave Request?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Full day Leave Request
entry.content:
According to the designed system behavior, this functionality is not available . Half day and Full day options are by default shown in drop down while creating Leave request.

We request you to please post your requirement with the customer influence forum available in the link < https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/886 >

entry.title: Re: Question about report for Sales in SAP S/4HANA Public...
entry.content:
This might also be a useful reference for you:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/protect-and-control-sales-order-margins-with-business-rules/ba-p/13525154

More about custom logic but as a part of it, they demonstrate identifying and utilizing the profit margin which will use the components you're looking for.

Thank you so much for the invite!! and the bootcamp link! Checking both 😊...
Best regards, 
Natalia

entry.title: Re: How to receive and invoice bitcoin in SAP - Proof of Concept
entry.content:
Hi Koni, great work! 

To integrate that such kind of payment solution into real SAP product SAP should offer such "BTCpayserver" application via BTP. 

But as you said first SAP should provide a solution to manage BTC. That includes management of UTXO (so management of private keys). I'm thinking on multi-sig solution where at least two signatures are needed to "interact" with BTC protocol. 

Then BTC subledger is needed to valuate BTC holdings and get it into financial reporting.

entry.title: Re: Mass comparison of Roles
entry.content: Why don't you share the report on GitHub?

entry.title: How to get SOA Manager Logical Port configuration Details in ABAP program
entry.content:
Hi colleagues,

Can anyone help me how to retrieve the authentication data like user name in logical port? In tcode SOAMANAGER > Service Administration > Web Service Configuration then Search by Consumer Proxy then Display. I would like to get the userID in ABAP program. Can someone help me know in what table were they stored?

From my side I have used ST05 to trace the webservice update process. But I couldn't find related data from the table which listed by ST05 like SRT_CFG_DIR, SRT_CFG_CLI_ASGN, SRT_RTC_CFGVAL, SRT_RTC_DATA, etc.....

Is the authentication data not stored in SAP table or it stored as some encrypt  format? I only need to get the Logical Port authentication UserID to generate a report to list it for different configuration connection.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to obtain the monthly SalesOrder amount
entry.content:
Hi AngelaDai

Thanks you for the answers.
We wanted to be able to see the monthly order volume in SAC and custom analysis reports, so we needed to be able to extract it with CDSView.
Since it does not seem to exist in CDSView, it seems that there is no other way than to create the data in an external system.

Best regards,

Kyosuke

entry.title: FP2402 New Installation
entry.content:
We are testing the installation of a new server:

WS2022+SQL 2019+Business One 10.0 FP2402+Crystal 2020 SP4

The installation was carried out without problems, no warnings, or errors.

When accessing the system services we have observed that the Job Service is not there. I am attaching the image "Services 10.0 FP2402.png" with the services installed.

Services in SO

When accessing the SLD, the image "Control center.png" appears correctly attached.
The registered services appear correctly attached image "SLD.png"

SLD control center

Services in SLD

When accessing the job service from the SL, this appears attached as "Job Service.png"

Job Service
According to the product documentation, there should be a service as such in the operating system and the window that the SLD opens should be different.


Then 2 options are presented:
Does SAP not have something well documented or updated in the installation guides?
Is it installed correctly, is the workflow service the one that controls the alerts and the sending of alerts in this version?

This same problem has arisen in the migration from version 9.3 to 10.0 FP2208 carried out in production.
We think that it is a problem or circumstance derived from the migration and change of technology to 64 bits of services, etc., but the surprise is that in a new installation made from scratch, this is also the case.

entry.title: Re: If we added a filter, shouldn't the select query run faster?
entry.content: Try ST05 and "Explain" (https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/the-sql-trace-st05-quick-and-easy/ba-p/12823559). Select Execution plan is most likely confused. You have quite many joins, conditions etc. so it might behave strange. Also check indexes.

entry.title: How to create a REST API to accept undefined variables in URL & Headers?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,
 
We need to develop an API in SAP PO that will be consumed by another system, but the requirement is in such a way that we should be able to accept API calls regardless of what’s sent in the {variable} part of the example URL below.
 
Example URL: https://host:port/RESTAdapter/{variable1}/{variable2}/{variable3}...../{variablen} where variables, parameters and number of variables & parameters are not predefined and can be anything.

Headers, payload structures & operations (GET, POST etc.) as well are all going to be variable. We would never know what the invoked URL, headers, payload structures and HTTP methods will be. Variables can be anything & everything is what we were told. These variables from sender are also expected to be captured by PO & utilized when making the connection with receiver. Please advise if this can be implemented.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to set filter values using URL Paramet...
entry.content:
Hi,

Is this for Fiori elements OData V2 or V4? In any case, adding a filter value in the URL should already work - something like abc.html#<Semantic Object>-<Action>?OrderType=ABC

This should bring in ABC value into the OrderType filter property. The other (more standard) way would be to define this as a FLP TargetMapping property for this intent and then have this value passed from the source application. Maybe https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER_750/cc1c7615ee2f4a699a9272453379006c/bd8ae3d327ab4541bcce8e7353c046fc.html?version=7.5.17 is helpful.

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: Re: If we added a filter, shouldn't the select query run...
entry.content: Only, if there is an index on these fields. Otherwise a full table scan is done.

entry.title: Re: Cloud-Native Lab #2 - Comparing Cloud Foundry and Kyma Manifests
entry.content:
yes we are using the SDK. Here is the deployment manifest

 

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: testapp-s4cloud-connection
  namespace: tests-testapp-s4hanacloud-connection
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: testapp-s4cloud-connection
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: testapp-s4cloud-connection
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: testapp-s4cloud-connection
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: 'false'
    spec:
      imagePullSecrets: [{'regcred'}]
      containers:
        - name: testapp-s4cloud-connection
          image:  repo2024/testapp_btp_connection:0.1.7-SNAPSHOT
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: 64Mi
              cpu: 50m
            limits:
              memory: 128Mi
              cpu: 100m
            ports:
              - containerPort: 8080
                name: http
            imagePullPolicy: Always
            env:
              - name: SERVICE_BINDING_ROOT
                value: "/bindings"
            volumeMounts:
              - name: testapp-destination-test
                mountPath: "/bindings/testapp-destination-test"
                readOnly: true
              - name: my-xsuaa-test
                mountPath: "/bindings/my-xsuaa-test"
                readOnly: true
      volumes:
        - name: testapp-destination-test
          secret:
            secretName: testapp-destination-test-binding
        - name: my-xsuaa-test
          secret:
            secretName: my-xsuaa-test-binding
---
 apiVersion: v1
 kind: Service
 metadata:
  name: testapp-s4cloud-connection
  labels:
    app: testapp-s4cloud-connection
 spec:
   type: NodePort
   ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
   selector:
     app: testapp-s4cloud-connection

Julian

entry.title: SAC Story Filters: Advanced Filtering with BW Live Data
entry.content:

In SAP help it seems as if it should work... or at least there is no exclusion defined for BW live models?

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/90c10b3bc47944f39cdaa3cc002fe96a.html?locale=en-US

Martin

entry.title: Re: Migration and Upgrade from SAP SCM 7.0 EHP3 on Window...
entry.content: Hi Sriram, about your last reply: is there a procedure that we can follow in order to avoid to perform any actions on source Livecache system before upgrading SAP SCM 7.0 EHP3 ? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Enhancement in MIGO
entry.content:
Requirement : Enhancement in MIGO

T-Code - MIGO

Current situation:

In MIGO, when we put outbound delivery number and press enter it automatically takes the document date as system date and delivery no. as outbound delivery number (same as of we entered first).

Expected requirement:

Now, for particular case (for A01 Goods Receipt and R05 Outbound Delivery), when we put outbound delivery number and press enter it automatically takes the document date as system date and delivery no. it should automatically take the invoice no. (VBELN) and created on (ERDAT).

  • I have tried using BAdI MB_MIGO_BADI but I am not able to modify the document date and delivery note.
  • I have also tried using MB_DOCUMENT_UPDATE but it is also not triggering there. As I am using SAP ECC 6.0,  this BAdI does not contain a method MB_DOCUMENT_BEFORE_UPDATE. It is there in S/4 HANA but not in ECC.
  • I have also tried USER EXIT MBCF0002, but it is not triggering on ENTER. It is triggering on check.

What should be the solution for this?
Please help.

entry.title: Re: CRM Courses
entry.content:
CRM courses can definitely be a good springboard for diving into the world of customer relationship management. But have you considered the wild world of project management tools like monday.com? It's like oiling the CRM engine – keeping things organized and tasks flowing smoothly.

I recently started working with a monday.com consultant, and let me tell you, it's been a game-changer. They helped me streamline my workflows and visualize everything in one place. It felt like going from a rolodex to a sleek, digital rolodex with superpowers!

Don't get me wrong, CRM is essential, but monday.com can be a fantastic sidekick. It's like having a personal CRM butler ensuring everything runs like clockwork.

entry.title: Re: RFC registered program
entry.content: Hi thomas_mller13,

entry.title: Re: RFC registered program
entry.content: What do you mean with update RFC destination. In the RFC (SM59) I have a destination only with the name of the program. But that is a program registered in our SAP gateway and nothing else. The question is if the external program must be re-registered again in the SAP gateway or not, after the server hosting the external program changed the IP .

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to set filter values using URL Paramet...
entry.content: The source would be a link on an email, hence the typical cross application navigation scenario doesn't apply. I tried the URL parameter, but it didn't apply and got lost in the app state parameters.

entry.title: Re: RFC registered program
entry.content:
The RFC server itself registers at gateway. In SM59 you declare where ABAP calls are routed:

Example: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=q-pR78zPXhc&t=15s

 

Note: For tests it is easier to disable the parameter gw/acl_mode in gateway.

entry.title: SAP Workflow Management - OData response headers
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are building few workflows in SAP Build Process Automation Pro-code approach.

In that we are calling OData Services in Service Task, which returns Response header to a POST calls in sap-message. But from Service Task we are able to read only response body and not the response headers returned from OData POST service like Success Message like "Sales order is created with ABCD number" etc.

Please suggest any option to handle this requirement.

 

Regards,

Satya

* Note - Re-posting same question in Technology Q&A

entry.title: Stop/sizing generation of Wily Introscope Logs
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have Wily Introscope installed and running in our BOBJ cluster. Recently we saw large log files being created. can you please let me know 

  • How to turn off logging of Wily Introscope agent?

Regards. 
 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SBPA - How to handle Intermediate Message Event requirement
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have few requirement/scenario to implement using Intermediate Message event in workflow, earlier we  had implement using workflows(Workflow Management).

Now we thought of implementing using complete workflow requirement in Process automation using Business processes, but we don't see Intermediate message event options.

Example scenario : In-between Business Process execution need to wait until get information received from external system (Non - SAP Applications).

Please suggest how to handle this requirements.

Regards,

Satya

entry.title: Re: Stop/sizing generation of Wily Introscope Logs
entry.content:
Introscope is a third-party tool developed and maintained by Broadcom. 

I found the following Broadcom link showing how to prevent the IntroscopeAgent from writing its log and methods to restrict the logfile size without stopping it completely.

  • How to disable agent logs AutoProbe.log and IntroscopeAgent.log (broadcom.com)

I found this KBA as well: 

  • 2136416 - High number of Introscope AutoProbe log files being created after the Introscope JAVA Agent setup for SAP BusinessObjects Enterprises

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello @sveabecker ,

Please @sdelamott on LinkedIn so we can celebrate your anniversary together online.

I relocated to Spain in 2018 for an SAP project and am now looking forward to the opening of a new SAP office in Pamplona, Navarra. 😊

Although it may not be within SAP's usual scope, but you never know.

Is there an SAP Community location group in Northern Spain?

Thank you!

entry.title: Restful ABAP Object Page #LINEITEM_REFERENCE
entry.content:
Hi experts,
I am currently using On Premise system and tried to follow some of the blogs to create a line item in an object page facet. but the line item in object page is not showing I don't know what is missing.

 
check my facet 2, the records is not displaying.

my CDS view header(VBAK)

CDS View Item(VBAP) this should be displayed in object page

Metadata 

I already expose the two CDS but nothing happens

entry.title: Re: Best Practices for using current SAP APM Rules for Condition Monitoring
entry.content:
@AndySilvey  SAP IoT and SAP Edge Services are in sunset and by now must customers using it have moved on to other IoT Platforms. SAP is not investing anymore in this area since 2022 but will partner. If you look into the what's new section of the documentation you can see that functions of SAP IoT are deprecated one after the other as customers are stopping to use them.

Applications that had embedded SAP IoT in the past are moving on and for example for SAP APM customers they can either bring their own IoT stack or leverage an embedded IoT stack. This blog points in this direction https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-sap/simplifying-the-iot-puzzle-with-sap-asset-performance-management-and/ba-p/13579517 and please expect further announcements on this around SAP Sapphire.

entry.title: Re: 🇪🇸 SAP CodeJam BTP: Connecting systems and services using SAP Integration Suite (Valencia, Spa
entry.content:
Hello Rahul,

Thanks for showing the interest to have such event in Mumbai, India. Do you have a topic which is of interest and the timeline? i'll mail you with the details of the topic that is offered.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning with SAP SuccessFactors (HXM): Step by Step Illustrations of the Be
entry.content:
Hi @Manivannan ,

I would need some help in how i can do this : Merge Position Query and Job Information Query through Position Number as common key between them. Job Information.

 

I have three Dimensions: Position dimension ( master Data with position key  ), employee dimension ( Master data with position Data ) & HR dimension ( matrix data query with position key )  . 

I want to show Position data - > corresponding user data -> corresponding HR 

 

Note I have done data imports and I have the data for User / position and Hr position in dimension tables . I am looking out a way to show all this related data in a planning table but i dont know how to do it , as u suggested Data Actions -> I dont know how to link them and then also display ( write back ? ) could u suggest ?

entry.title: Re: FP2402 New Installation
entry.content:
Hi gonzalogomez,

You have Job Service in SLD -> Services tab and Service Layer installed.

The alerts should work fine.

Can you mention which documentation are you referring which is causing the confusion? Please share the screenshot for the same.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 3
entry.content:
8ba714baecff9a4241df012bc156c5aacbb94110a540e7d7aa50bfdae5cecd74

Think that there's something wrong with the model app, in the Hash page the community ID isn't bound to the app variable, neither is the StringToHash

entry.title: Re: [PM] Can Audit Trail display both "date and time" ins...
entry.content:
Hi H.K.,

Unfortunately, it's current design that only date is displayed in the audit trail. Timestamp is not shown.

As for workaround, are you suggesting that you'd like to show the timestamp on the form? If that's the case, then I'm afraid it's not possible to achieve this at the moment.

If you'd like to get this information via report, you may use Story report. Currently, only Story report can pull the timestamp of route map audit trail.
KBA: 3385382 - Performance Forms Audit Trail Reporting - Performance Management

BR,
Yilin

entry.title: Human Skills The Multidisciplinary Edge for Enterprise Architects
entry.content:
"The Future Engineer" presentation by Ferose V R at the Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architect Forum 2024 encapsulates a transformative vision for the role of engineers and architects in the evolving technological landscape. It advocates for the development of multidimensional engineers who integrate deep technical expertise with broad, interdisciplinary knowledge, including the humanities and arts. Emphasizing core values such as courage, compassion, curiosity, community, and craftsmanship, the talk and accompanying presentation highlight the importance of adopting a long-term perspective, learning from the ingenuity of past engineering titans, and committing to ethical practices and social responsibility. Through fostering ingenuity, embracing continuous learning, and harnessing the power of storytelling, the presentation outlines a roadmap for nurturing future engineers who are equipped to lead, innovate, and contribute positively to society in an interconnected world.

The Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architect Forum 2024 has once again proven to be a crucible of forward-thinking ideas, where the future of technology and its creators are reimagined. Among the illuminating sessions, V R Ferose's presentation, "The Future Engineer," stood out for its profound insights and inspiring vision. Ferose, the Senior Vice President and Head of SAP Academy for Engineering, shared his blueprint for developing the next wave of engineering talent at SAP, focusing on a multidimensional approach that marries technical skills with broader humanistic and ethical considerations.

Core Insights from Ferose's Talk:

1. Beyond Technical Skills - The Multidimensional Engineer:

Ferose passionately argued for the evolution of engineers from mere technical problem solvers to multidimensional innovators. This new breed of engineers would not only excel in their technical domains but also possess skills in the humanities, arts, and ethics, enabling them to approach problems with empathy, creativity, and a deep sense of social responsibility.

2. Core Values as the Foundation:

Central to Ferose's vision are core values of courage, compassion, curiosity, community, and craftsmanship. These values are envisioned as the guiding stars for engineers, shaping their approach to challenges, interactions with peers, and the impact of their work on the world

3. Learning from the Past, Building for the Future:

Drawing inspiration from engineering titans of the past and present, Ferose emphasized the importance of learning from their journeys. By understanding the traits that led to their success, future engineers can imbibe qualities like resilience, ingenuity, and a commitment to making a difference.

4. Storytelling as a Key Skill:

Emphasizing the power of storytelling, Ferose highlighted its significance in bridging the gap between complex engineering solutions and their implications in the real world. Storytelling is not just for entertainment but a crucial skill for engineers to articulate, inspire, and lead.

5. A Commitment to the Greater Good:

"The Future Engineer" also called for engineers to pledge their skills towards the betterment of society. This altruistic vision aligns with the broader mission of SAP to use technology as a force for good, ensuring that innovations contribute positively to the world.

  • V R Ferose's "The Future Engineer" was not just a session; it's was a manifesto for the next generation of SAP engineers. It challenges us to rethink the essence of engineering and its role in society. As we chart our paths forward, let's keep these insights at the forefront, ensuring that we not only excel in our technical endeavors but also contribute to creating a world that's more inclusive, sustainable, and compassionate. 

    Main Recommendations

    These recommendations aim to shape future enterprise architects who are not only technically skilled but also possess a broad range of human skills and ethical considerations, enabling them to lead and innovate in a complex, interconnected world.

    • Foster Ingenuity and Craftsmanship: Encourage the cultivation of an ingenious mindset and craftsmanship in engineering practices. This involves approaching engineering challenges with creative solutions and a meticulous attention to detail, ensuring high-quality outcomes.
    • Adopt a Long-Term Perspective: Future enterprise architects are advised to embrace a long-term mindset in their work, focusing on sustainable solutions that consider future implications and the lasting impact of their projects on society and the environment.
    • Explore Engineering Titans: Study the lives and works of historical and contemporary engineering figures to extract valuable lessons on resilience, innovation, and the diverse paths to success. This exploration can serve as inspiration and guidance for personal and professional growth.
    • Emphasize the Multi-Dimensional Engineer: Move beyond the traditional "T-shaped" model and cultivate "Pi-shaped" engineers who possess deep technical skills, broad knowledge across disciplines, and an artistic or humanitarian lens through which they view their work.
    • Core Values as Guiding Principles: Embed core values such as courage, compassion, curiosity, community, and craftsmanship into the ethos of enterprise architecture. These values should guide decision-making, project execution, and interpersonal interactions within and beyond the workplace.
    • Commit to Personal and Collective Consciousness: Engineers should pledge to use their talents and knowledge with a conscious commitment to ethical practices, contributing to the welfare of society, and the responsible stewardship of technological advancements.
    • Diverse and Inclusive Content Stack: Embrace a curriculum that integrates a comprehensive technology stack with multidisciplinary skills, including cross-cultural intelligence, purpose-driven leadership, and effective communication. This approach ensures that future architects are well-prepared to tackle complex challenges and lead diverse teams.
    • Journaling and Reflection for Growth: Encourage the practice of journaling and reflection as tools for personal development, critical thinking, and emotional intelligence. Regular self-reflection can enhance learning experiences and foster a growth mindset.
    • Community Engagement and Hackathons: Engage in community-building activities and participate in hackathons to apply skills in real-world scenarios, foster innovation, and strengthen collaborations. These experiences can provide practical insights and strengthen the architect's ability to work effectively in team settings.
    • Leadership through Storytelling: Develop the art of storytelling as a leadership tool. Effective storytelling can inspire teams, articulate visions clearly, and bridge the gap between technical solutions and their impact on people's lives.

      Key Recommendations for SAP's Engineering Community:

      • Embrace Multidisciplinarity: Engineers should actively seek knowledge outside their technical fields, exploring areas like psychology, art, and ethics to enrich their problem-solving toolkit.
      • Live by Core Values: The SAP engineering community is encouraged to internalize the core values outlined by Ferose, allowing them to guide professional and personal growth.
      • Learn from the Legends: Investigate the lives and works of prominent engineers, drawing lessons and inspiration for your own career.
      • Master the Art of Storytelling: Develop your storytelling skills to effectively communicate complex ideas and connect with diverse audiences.
      • Pledge for Positive Impact: Reflect on how your skills and projects can contribute to societal betterment, aligning your work with SAP’s vision for a better future.

      Remember:

      "“In the VUCA (volatile, uncertain, complex, and ambiguous) world we live in, the biggest differentiation is the ability to make connections in seemingly disconnected things. And the way to do that, is to build multi-dimensional human skills.""  - Ferose V R"

      Access Presentation: Here

      Watch the YouTube Video of Ferose's Presentation: Here  

      Connect with and follow Paul Kurchina for more SAP Community Updates: LinkedIn Profile

      Photo's from Ferose's Talk:

entry.content: Is your app visible in HTML5 Applications in the BTP cockpit?

entry.title: Re: Custom data as table, CDS, Domain, Business object and all that jazz...
entry.content:
This is a beautiful blog @mlauber . It always helps when you explain a new technology but linking it with the old / classic world.

 

Just a question. How could we create events linked to the custom business objects ( Events that can be sent to Event Mesh) ?

 

Thanks

Saurabh

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to set filter values using URL Paramet...
entry.content: @Joel_John: It should be exactly in this format: https://abc.def/yourFLPSandbox.html#SemanticObject-SemanticAction?OrderType=ABC&/?sap-iapp-state=<key> and make sure to use the exact technical name of the property as it is in the metadata for the filter field.

entry.title: Re: Budget billing procedure (3) u2013 Impact of alternate start month
entry.content: Do we need to maintain the Alternate start month in contract level? (in EVER)

entry.title: Re: Entering debugging with ADT ends up always in SAPMSSYD
entry.content: Hello jrgkraus and Sandra. Unfortunately the issue is not reproducible in our internal systems. I tested with SAP_BASIS 7.50 and 7.52, newest SP each, newest version of ADT&Eclipse. I also discussed this with my colleagues and nobody was aware, so it is not a known problem. I assume that you use the ok code '/h' and not '/hs', correct? Ok-code /hs is like /h but it also directly activates system debugging. The only thing we found is that we maybe have a bit of an undefined situation if the system debugging setting is deactivated in ADT but ok-code /hs is used. However I assume this is unrelated to your problem and unfortunately I was unable to stop in SAPMSSYD with using /h only. Do you use ADT as the only tool for debugging or do you sometimes switch between ADT Debugger and GUI Debugger? There is a conflict potential between the ADT debugger and SAP GUI external breakpoints if used for the same system+client+username at the same time.

entry.title: Re: where clause in select query
entry.content:
HI,

Where clause is reducing and filtering the data for required based on inputs..we can pass * also in Where clause in sap abap select..Please find the below code

    SELECT berid,repobj,repobj_date,rqmt_date,matnr,werks
      FROM pmmo_assignment
      INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_pmmo)
      WHERE repobj LIKE 'OR%' AND matnr IN @s_matnr.

entry.title: Re: Best Practices for using current SAP APM Rules for Condition Monitoring
entry.content:
Hi @marcus_behrens thank you very much for confirming.

That is such a shame, this Technical Architecture is so elegant:

 

and combined with all of the Adapters, the IoT Edge SDK, the solution is at the same time so flexible, and also SAP standard and natively integrating to the Core and the BTP and the other Products like APM.

Such a shame, so well thought out.

Thank you for confirming.

Andy.

entry.title: Re: SAP Hybris Marketing: Customer Data Upload

Hi Hammad,

1st of all, 1909 is out of maintenance. It is strongly recommended to upgrade to 2020 as soon as possible.

Please refer to our documentation Contacts | SAP Help Portal which describes the API that we offer.

Best Regards, Isabelle

entry.title: Re: Late Coming and Early Departure Detection for Double Shifts on the same day - SF Time Tracking
entry.content:
Hi Bernardo,

I don´t see a connection of this to this wonderful blog.

In standard it is not possible to create an absence automatically.

However, you probably could maybe achieve via integration center, upon a trigger similar as described above. 

Best regards

Volker

entry.title: Re: gigya.socialize.addeventhandlers is not firing onLogin event function
entry.content: can you try gigya.accounts.addEventHandlers({onLogin: handler})?

entry.title: Re: gigya.socialize.addeventhandlers is not firing onLogi...
entry.content:
Hi, 

Please register your events

1. gigya.socialize.addeventhandlers

2. gigya.accounts.addeventhandlers

And check.

 

I you face additional issues we recommend opening a case to our support team.

entry.title: Re: How To Logout From Identity Provider in SAPUI5 Application in SAP Cloud Platform
entry.content: That's no real logout - that's just a redirect. How is the coding for a real logoff.

entry.title: Re: Using UI Theme Designer in SAP Enterprise Portal
entry.content: I am not able to see the video, it is saying "This Video is private". Can you share video with me on kamalkiri@gmail.com.

entry.title: Re: Cloud-Native Lab #2 - Comparing Cloud Foundry and Kyma Manifests
entry.content:
Hello, thank you for the above deployment manifest.

1. The SERVICE_BINDING_ROOT part of it looks fine. 

 

 

 

            env:
              - name: SERVICE_BINDING_ROOT
                value: "/bindings"
            volumeMounts:
              - name: testapp-destination-test
                mountPath: "/bindings/testapp-destination-test"
                readOnly: true
              - name: my-xsuaa-test
                mountPath: "/bindings/my-xsuaa-test"
                readOnly: true
      volumes:
        - name: testapp-destination-test
          secret:
            secretName: testapp-destination-test-binding
        - name: my-xsuaa-test
          secret:
            secretName: my-xsuaa-test-binding

 

 

 

2. Assuming the below is the destination service instance and binding manifests with the S/4 destination definition pointing to a SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud sandbox from SAP API Business Hub.

 

 

 

apiVersion: services.cloud.sap.com/v1
kind: ServiceInstance
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.services.dest.name }}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ .Values.services.dest.name }}
spec:
  externalName: '{{ .Values.services.dest.name }}-{{ .Release.Namespace }}'
  serviceOfferingName: destination
  servicePlanName: lite 
  parameters:  
    init_data:
      instance:
        existing_destinations_policy: ignore
        existing_certificates_policy: ignore
        destinations:
          - Name: faas-s4hc-api
            Description: S/4HANA Cloud
            URL: https://sandbox.api.sap.com/s4hanacloud
            Type: HTTP
            ProxyType: Internet
            Authentication: NoAuthentication
            URL.headers.APIKey: {{ .Values.services.dest.APIKey }}
            URL.headers.Application-Interface-Key: {{ .Values.services.dest.ApplicationInterfaceKey }}
            HTML5.DynamicDestination: "true"
            
          - Name: faas-nw
            Description: Northwind
            URL: https://services.odata.org/v2/Northwind/Northwind.svc
            Type: HTTP
            ProxyType: Internet
            Authentication: NoAuthentication
            HTML5.DynamicDestination: "true"

apiVersion: services.cloud.sap.com/v1
kind: ServiceBinding
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.services.dest.bindingName }}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ .Values.services.dest.bindingName }}
spec:
  serviceInstanceName: {{ .Values.services.dest.name }}
  externalName: {{ .Values.services.dest.name }}
  secretName: {{ .Values.services.dest.bindingSecretName }}
  parameters: {}
  parametersFrom: []

 

 

 

Both are instance level destination definitions to help test your java code. 

You should be able to call these two destination using SAP Cloud SDK for java.

3. with the following values:

 

 

 

clusterDomain:
gateway:
services:
  app:
    name: testapp-s4cloud-connection
    port: '8080'
  uaa:
    name: my-xsuaa-test
    xsappname: fun
    bindingName: my-xsuaa-test-binding
    bindingSecretName: my-xsuaa-test-binding-secret
  dest:
    name: testapp-destination-test
    bindingName: testapp-destination-test-binding
    bindingSecretName: testapp-destination-test-binding-secret
    ApplicationInterfaceKey: saptest0
    APIKey: <-- your Business Hub API Key goes here

 

 

 

Thank you.

PS. For instance, a code snippet in java script to retrieve the sales order from the sanbox using the SAP Cloud SDK for javascript

 

        const { retrieveJwt } = require('@sap-cloud-sdk/connectivity');
        const { setGlobalLogLevel, createLogger } = require('@sap-cloud-sdk/util');
        const { desc } = require('@sap-cloud-sdk/odata-v2');
        const { salesOrderService } = require('@sap/cloud-sdk-vdm-sales-order-service');
        const { salesOrderApi, salesOrderItemApi } = salesOrderService();
 
       async function getSalesOrders(req) {
          return salesOrderApi.requestBuilder()
            .getAll()
            .filter(salesOrderApi.schema.TOTAL_NET_AMOUNT.greaterThan(2000))
            .top(3)
            .orderBy(desc(salesOrderApi.schema.LAST_CHANGE_DATE_TIME))
            .select(
              salesOrderApi.schema.SALES_ORDER,
              salesOrderApi.schema.LAST_CHANGE_DATE_TIME,
              salesOrderApi.schema.INCOTERMS_LOCATION_1,
              salesOrderApi.schema.TOTAL_NET_AMOUNT,              salesOrderApi.schema.TO_ITEM.select(salesOrderItemApi.schema.MATERIAL, salesOrderItemApi.schema.NET_AMOUNT)
            )
            .execute({
              destinationName: 'faas-s4hc-api'
              ,
              jwt: retrieveJwt(req)

            });
        }

entry.title: Re: How to get SOA Manager Logical Port configuration Det...
entry.content:
Hi Kevin, 

If this a  Webservice for Consumer, then the 3rd party should provide the user for authetication,  which you could then store it in a ztable in case of update, and write an logic to automatically fill those field when running.

Hope it helps.

Regards,

entry.content:
Hello Experts!

We're trying to setup an S/4 HANA system and HANA database (new installation) via the SAP Provisioning Manager 2.0. During installation the PM halts the installation at 54% and prompts us the following error

We're trying to install on RHEL 8.6 with the following hardware specs:

RAM:32GB

CPU:8 core

Storage:800GB

  • How can this error be solved?

Thank you very much for your help!

Best regards,Maryam

SAP S/4HANA 

Red Hat Enterprise Linux

entry.title: Invalid token detected at position 149
entry.content:
Hi All,
I'm trying to do a ODATA call with the following query:
$select=MaterialDocumentYear,MaterialDocument,MaterialDocumentItem,Material,Plant,GoodsMovementType,to_MaterialDocumentHeader/CreationDate,to_MaterialDocumentHeader/CreationTime,QuantityInBaseUnit,QuantityInEntryUnit&$expand=to_MaterialDocumentHeader&$filter=to_MaterialDocumentHeader/CreationDate ge datetime'${property.LSRD}' and GoodsMovementType eq '101' and to_MaterialDocumentHeader/CreationTime ge time'${property.LSRT}'

LSDR=2023-01-01T00:00:00

LSRT=1970-01-01T06:00:00

But I'm facing the below error

 
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<error xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata">
<code>005056A509B11EE1B9A8FEC11C21178E</code>
<message xml:lang="en">Invalid token detected at position 149</message>
</error>
 
Can anyone please why this Error is encountered and how to resolve it.


Thanks in Advance,
Sudarshan


@Dan_Wroblewski  ,@Sriprasadsbhat, @Sookriti_Mishra , @JulianoRomanato , MortenWittrock

entry.title: Re: If we added a filter, shouldn't the select query run...
entry.content:
I solved the problem.
This problem occurred because I used "SELECT DISTINCT" and "GROUP BY" together.
The problem was solved when I removed "DISTINCT" and continued with "GROUP BY".

SELECT DISTINCT and GROUP BY do almost the same job, so let's not use them both in the same "select" 🙂
